title: Sample soils and interpret results
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Sample soils and interpret results demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for soil sampling

pcs.text: Identify soil to be sampled and sampling method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify soil to be sampled and sampling method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify soil to be sampled and sampling method.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required for safely collecting soil samples according to testing agency requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for safely collecting soil samples according to testing agency requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for safely collecting soil samples according to testing agency requirements.

pcs.text: Identify areas of homogeneous soil types for sampling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify areas of homogeneous soil types for sampling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas of homogeneous soil types for sampling.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate services in consultation with site supervisor.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement controls to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement controls to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use safety and personal protective equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare a clean and safe work area and maintain throughout and on completion of work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a clean and safe work area and maintain throughout and on completion of work.

elements.title: Determine soil characteristics by performing soil sampling

pcs.text: Determine the density and depth for a representative sampling of the area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the density and depth for a representative sampling of the area.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take soil sub-samples at identified sampling sites.

pcs.text: Collect soil samples for testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect soil samples for testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect soil samples for testing.

pcs.text: Prepare, package, label and dispatch samples for off-site testing

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare, package, label and dispatch samples for off-site testing.

pcs.text: Document the physical and chemical characteristics of the soil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the physical and chemical characteristics of the soil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the physical and chemical characteristics of the soil.

pcs.text: Clean and store sampling and testing tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store sampling and testing tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace requirements.

elements.title: Interpret results of soil analysis

pcs.text: Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Classify the soil types of the sample area according to standards for soil classification.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, from published data and records, the acceptable soil physical and chemical parameters for a specified plant.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare collected analytical results with acceptable physical and chemical parameters for a specified plant?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare collected analytical results with acceptable physical and chemical parameters for a specified plant.

pcs.text: Evaluate soil characteristics to determine whether they can be altered to meet plant needs

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate soil characteristics to determine whether they can be altered to meet plant needs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the Readily Available Water (RAW) values for irrigation sites.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can File and record results according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide recommendations to improve soil characteristics.
